betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Bedrock Ore Processing§f unlocks resources from §bbedrock-level deposits§f using specialized solvents.

§eSolvents (by tier):§f
• Basic Acidizer Solvent - Common materials
• Advanced Solvent - Rare materials  
• §bHigh-Performance Solvent§f - Rarest materials (Bismuth, Technetium-99)

§eProcess:§f
1. Use §bOre Acidizer§f with bedrock ore samples
2. Higher-tier solvents yield rarer materials
3. Install §bEffectiveness upgrade§f to reduce consumption

§aTip:§f Work toward High-Performance Solvent for the best yields.
